rationale: Docs improvement and code consolidation for IndexModel.Keys ordering; no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor to remove code duplication between IsMaster.Result and description.NewServer; no spec deviation.
CMAP spec requires poolCleared event; pool.drain() omits it, contradicting spec event emission rules.
Bug in error unwrapping logic for network timeout; internal implementation fix, no specific spec rule cited.
TLS CA cert support improvement; no cross-driver spec area involved.
Internal refactor deduplicating cluster/operation time update calls; behavior unchanged, no spec violation.
Reduce default keepalive time to align with Azure; network tuning, not a spec requirement.
SingleConnectionDeployment doesn't implement ErrorProcessor per SDAM error handling spec; change streams affected.
Documentation-only fix noting allowDiskUse is 4.4+ only; no behavior change or spec rule violated.
Connection pool snowball behavior under load/timeout; implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
Server descriptions missing address in error cases; internal implementation bug, no specific SDAM spec rule cited.
TLS hostname not set when InsecureSkipVerify=true; implementation bug in TLS config, no spec area.
CI/test coverage improvement for OCSP and AWS auth on 4.4+; not a driver behavior fix.
API ergonomics improvement for structured BSON unmarshal errors; no spec area or rule involved.
URI parser rejects single-character passwords; connection string spec requires valid passwords of any length.
Custom test dialer for test infrastructure; internal test tooling improvement, not a driver behavior fix.
averageRTTSet never set true; implementation bug affecting RTT averaging but no specific SDAM spec rule on this field.
CPU spin loop after change stream invalidation; implementation bug, no spec rule on post-invalidate cursor behavior.
Go error wrapping improvements for error.Is compatibility; language-binding ergonomics, not a spec requirement.
BSON performance benchmarking vs mgo community driver; performance issue, not a spec conformance matter.
Implementing SDAM spec changes and new spec tests for topologyVersion and stale error handling; depends DRIVERS-1187.
Handshake connection callback causing RTT skew and lock contention; implementation improvement, no specific SDAM spec rule.
CI coverage improvement for OCSP tests; test infrastructure but not a YAML spec test update.
API ergonomics: allow interface{} in Cursor.All like mgo; feature request, no spec rule violated.
Retryable writes spec requires disabling on standalones; driver incorrectly enables them on standalone topology.
Context pinned by connect(); memory leak from stored cancellation function; internal implementation bug.
User support question about $filter aggregation behavior; resolved as user error, not a driver bug.
CMAP spec requires ConnectionClosed events for all close paths; pool omits events for graceful disconnect and network errors.
Spec clarification plus new transaction tests for RetryableWriteError label behavior; depends DRIVERS-1181.
Retry on 'Unable to acquire X lock' error; depends DRIVERS-1290, spec-driven improvement rollout.
connectTimeoutMS=0 behavior with streaming protocol was undefined; spec gap addressed via DRIVERS-1289.
Change streams spec: CursorNotFound should be treated as resumable; driver did not implement this correctly.
Adding test that ElectionInProgress is not resumed; depends DRIVERS-1318, test infrastructure update.
Performance comparison vs community mgo driver; performance issue, no spec conformance concern.
Wire protocol OP_MSG: main document not always first section; spec defines section ordering, driver assumed first.
Internal BSON codec refactor adding typeDecoder interface; implementation improvement, no spec deviation.
Flaky pool tests due to timing/memory; test reliability fix, no spec area.
Improve server selection error messages for TLS failures; UX improvement, no spec rule on error message format.
Add assertion to SRV+directConnection test; depends DRIVERS-1288, test infrastructure update.
Extended JSON floating point precision spec change; depends DRIVERS-792, spec test update rollout.
Clarify 'me' field vs 'hosts' mismatch behavior; depends DRIVERS-795, spec-driven improvement.
Add test coverage for valid maxStalenessSeconds with no viable servers; depends DRIVERS-1291, test infrastructure.
Always check TopologyVersion in SDAM spec tests; test infrastructure update for spec test correctness.
Add test coverage for single readPreferenceTags in URI; depends DRIVERS-989, spec test rollout.
Add SDAM test for incompatible server becoming compatible; depends DRIVERS-923, test infrastructure.
User support question about DNS/SRV connection timeout; user environment issue, not a driver bug.
SDAM spec requires running SDAM flow even when server description unchanged; driver skipped it, violating spec.
DateTime range limited by UnixNano overflow; implementation bug but no BSON spec rule on supported date range.
Add auth spec tests for authSource without username for external mechanisms; depends DRIVERS-949, test rollout.
Empty authSource URI option behavior was unspecified; spec gap addressed via DRIVERS-808.
